center.name: 卡利亞瓦亞山脈
center.summary: 卡利亞瓦亞山脈是秘魯的山脈，位於該國東南部，處於的的喀喀湖東北約175公里，屬於安第斯山脈的一部分，全長75公里，最高點海拔高度5,780米。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Wansu mountain range, southern Apurímac, has produced only one specimen (collected in 1977) and those from the northern Kallawaya mountain range in the Puno Region were taken in 1871
